title: senecio curvisquamus
intro: Senecio curvisquamus, also known as curved squamose groundsel, is a plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. Senecio curvisquamus is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
